entry.title: RES26-154 (Honolulu): CCL/PH → BUD
entry.content:

entry.title: RES26-158 (Honolulu): INTRO → EES
entry.content:
URGING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO CONDUCT A CITYWIDE ENERGY VULNERABILITY ASSESSMENT AND TO REPORT ITS FINDINGS AND RECOMMENDATIONS TO THE COUNCIL.

Status: INTRO → EES

Latest action: CR-201(26) Reported out for adoption.

entry.title: RES26-161 (Honolulu): INTRO → EES
entry.content:
REQUESTING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO DEVELOP MINIMUM STANDARDS FOR ALL RESILIENCE HUBS CONSTRUCTED OR RETROFITTED USING THE FUNDS APPROPRIATED IN THE FISCAL YEAR 2027 EXECUTIVE CAPITAL BUDGET.

Status: INTRO → EES

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL018(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO AFFORDABLE HOUSING.

Amends various development standards, building construction standards, and other requirements and benefits for affordable rental housing projects developed under ROH Chapter 32.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL022(26) (Honolulu): CCL → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO THE EXECUTIVE OPERATING BUDGET AND PROGRAM FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2026 TO JUNE 30, 2027.

Appropriates funds for the Executive Operating Budget for Fiscal Year 2027.

Status: CCL → PUBLISH

Latest action: Final reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL029(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Amends the requirements for filing a claim for a continued RPT exemption for low-income rental housing.

Status: CCL/PH → BUD

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL033(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Establishes a special fund to be called the Parks Maintenance and Recreation Services Revolving Fund for the deposit of all revenues and proceeds generated by the DPR relating to the use of lands dedicated for park use or for park maintenance and recreation services, or otherwise earmarked for the restoration, operation, or maintenance of beaches and parks under the jurisdiction of the DPR, to be expended for DPR operations, parks maintenance and recreational facilities, and programs under the jurisdiction of the DPR. Establishes a special fund to be called the Botanical Gardens and Urban Forestry Revolving Fund for the deposit of all revenues and proceeds relating to the use of lands dedicated for botanical gardens, community gardens, and urban forestry programs and operations generated by the DPR, or otherwise earmarked for the restoration, operation, or maintenance of gardens and park and street trees under the jurisdiction of the DPR, to be expended for the operations of the DPR's Division of Urban Forest

Status: CCL/PH → BUD

Latest action: See: Proposed draft version OCS2026-0422/7/7/2026 1:16 PM Amended to CD2 and postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL032(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO PUBLIC PARKS, RECREATIONAL FACILITIES, AND BOTANICAL GARDENS.

Repeals certain specific fees and charges for the use of botanical gardens, public parks, and recreational facilities. Authorizes the DPR Director to establish fees and charges by rule for the commercial and noncommercial use of parks; recreational facilities; and botanical gardens under the jurisdiction of the DPR and requires that the fees and charges collected (except those derived from the use of the Hanauma Bay Nature Preserve) be deposited into a fund designated by the DPR Director. Provides the DPR Director with rulemaking authority. Establishes reporting requirements. Takes effect upon approval; provided that fees established by ROH articles and sections to be repealed will remain in effect until the DPR Director adopts rules.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL031(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO CULTURAL SITES IN PUBLIC PARKS.

Allows the DPR Director to establish a program to allow for improved stewardship of cultural sites in City parks. Establishes the process for including cultural sites in City parks in the program and requires a stewardship plan. Provides the DPR Director with rulemaking authority. Imposes fines for violations.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL030(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO PUBLIC PARKS.

Amends provisions relating to the use of City parks for farmers' markets and food distribution events conducted by nonprofit organizations.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL035(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO STREETS, SIDEWALKS, MALLS, AND OTHER PUBLIC PLACES.

Repeals and amends provisions governing curbside tellers.

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL041(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO TRANSPORTATION.

Conforms ROH provisions to House Bill 2021, HD2, SD2, CD1, Relating to Transportation. Adds definitions for “Electric Bicycle,” “Class 1 Electric Bicycle,” Class 2 Electric Bicycle,” Class 3 Electric Bicycle, “Electric Micro-mobility Device, “High-speed Electric Device,” and “Electric Motorcycle.” Substitutes the term “electric bicycle” for the terms “bicycle with motor,” “motorized bicycles,” and similar terms. Substitutes the term “motor-driven cycle” for the term “motor scooter.” Regulates riding electric bicycles on sidewalks under certain circumstances. Prohibits on bikeways: (1) driving a vehicle, other than a bicycle, electric foot scooter, or electric micro-mobility device, with specified exceptions; and (2) operating mopeds or electric motorcycles. Prohibits a person under the age of sixteen from operating a class 2 or class 3 electric bicycle without direct supervision. Repeals as preempted: (1) certain safe driving requirements for the operation of electric bicycles on public streets, paths, or tra

Status: CCL/PH → PUBLISH

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL040(26) (Honolulu): CCL/PH → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Temporarily entitles the owner of certain owner-occupied condominium units to a real property tax home exemption. Applies retroactively to the tax year beginning July 1, 2025, and thereafter.

Status: CCL/PH → BUD

Latest action: Cancelled and not considered.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL047(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
REALTING TO THE MOTOR VEHICLE WEIGHT TAX.

Reduces the vehicle weight tax rates for motor vehicles designed primarily for carrying passengers; trucks and noncommercial vehicles having a net weight of 6,500 pounds or less; and vehicles designed for carrying property or for purposes other than carrying passengers. Takes effect on July 1, 2027.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-196(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL046(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Increases and makes uniform the real property tax homeowner’s exemption amount for taxpayers 65 years of age or over, to apply to all income levels and age brackets for taxpayers 65 years of age or over. Applies to tax years beginning July 1 2028, and thereafter.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-195(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL045(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Amends the real property tax homeowner’s exemption base amount. Applies to tax years beginning July 1, 2028 and thereafter.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-194(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL044(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REVENUES AND FUNDS.

Specifies certain percentages of TAT revenues to be deposited into the Parks Maintenance and Recreation Services Revolving Fund, the Honolulu Zoo Fund, and the Botanical Gardens and Urban Forestry Revolving Fund. Takes effect upon the date of the bill’s approval; or (2) the date on which Bill 33 (2026), CD1, or any amended version thereof, has been enacted into law and taken effect, whichever occurs later.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-193(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL050(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Repeals Chapter 6, Article 59, Revised Ordinances of Honolulu 2021 (“Land Conservation Fund”). Takes effect on July 1, 2028, and provides that all ordinances and resolutions, or portions thereof, that are in conflict or inconsistent with this bill are also repealed.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-197(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL049(26) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REVENUES AND FUNDS.

Specifies certain percentages of TAT revenues to be deposited into the Parks Maintenance and Recreation Services Revolving Fund and the Botanical Gardens and Urban Forestry Revolving Fund. Takes effect upon the date of the bill’s approval; or (2) the date on which Bill 33 (2026), or any amended version thereof, has been enacted into law and taken effect, whichever occurs later.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BILL051(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
RELATING TO PARKING.

Requires the DTS Director to mark with a warning certain parking restricted areas along curbs within one-quarter mile of any public access to a hiking trail.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BILL052(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
RELATING TO STREETS, SIDEWALKS, MALLS, AND OTHER PUBLIC PLACES.

Increases the fines for violations of ROH Chapter 13, Article 6, relating to peddling.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL068(25) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Amends the definition of income in ROH § 8-13.1 to clarify that only the titleholder’s income (and not the income of a non-titleholder who is included on a joint income tax return) will be considered when calculating income eligibility for the County Tax Credit.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: CR-192(26) Reported out for passage on second reading and scheduling of a public hearing.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL067(25) (Honolulu): CCL → BUD
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Establishes a valuation cap (either 2 percent of the preceding tax year’s assessed value of the real property or the rate of inflation per year, whichever is lower) for real property owned and occupied by a taxpayer 65 years or age or older. Specifies certain exceptions to the valuation cap. Effective for tax years beginning July 1, 2027.

Status: CCL → BUD

Latest action: Postponed to a date and time to be determined by the Committee Chair.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-165 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
GRANTING A SPECIAL MANAGEMENT AREA MAJOR PERMIT TO ALLOW FOR THE OʻAHU SUBSEA CABLE TELECOMMUNICATIONS PROJECT IN KAPOLEI, OʻAHU.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site

entry.title: BILL020(25) (Honolulu): CCL → MAYOR
entry.content:
RELATING TO FUNDS.

Creates a new Down Payment Loan Assistance Revolving Fund to receive and expend moneys to assist prospective homebuyers who reside in the City, do not own real property, and have an annual household income at 120 percent or below of the AMI of the City, as determined by HUD. Effective on July 1, 2025.

Status: CCL → MAYOR

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 07/24/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: RES26-065 (Honolulu): Committee report and Resolution were adopted.
entry.content:
URGING THE CITY ADMINISTRATION TO UPDATE AND IMPLEMENT THE ARCHAEOLOGICAL SITE PRESERVATION PLAN AND OTHER PLANNING DOCUMENTS FOR THE MAUNA LAHILAHI CULTURAL GARDEN, AS APPROPRIATE, WITH THE GOAL OF RESTORING THE AREA.

entry.title: RES26-146 (Honolulu): INTRO → CCL
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE DIRECTOR OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES TO ISSUE AND SELL IN ONE OR MORE SERIES NOT TO EXCEED $11,000,000 PRINCIPAL AMOUNT OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR FINANCING THE AMOUNT APPROPRIATED IN ORDINANCE NO. 26-13 (ALSO REFERRED TO, UPON ITS APPROVAL, AS BILL 23 (2026), CD2, FD1, AND AS MAY BE FURTHER AMENDED) OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU FOR THE PURPOSE OF FINANCING CAPITAL COSTS OF THE HONOLULU RAIL TRANSIT PROJECT.

Recommendation of the adoption of the Resolution authorizing the issuance and sale not to exceed principal amount of General Obligation Bonds to finance the capital costs of the Honolulu Rail Transit Project (“HRTP”); Capital Budget Ordinance for Fiscal Year July 1, 2026 to June 30, 2027; Honolulu Authority for Rapid Transportation (“HART’); Budget and Fiscal Services.

Status: INTRO → CCL

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution were adopted.

View on the council site

entry.title: RES26-145 (Honolulu): INTRO → CCL
entry.content:

Status: INTRO → CCL

entry.content:
